mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_sessions (trip_id, quiz_id, sort_order, status, created_at) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{quizId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.trip_id, s.quiz_id, q.heritage_id, h.name AS heritage_name, q.title, q.content, q.source, q.difficulty, s.sort_order FROM quiz_sessions s JOIN quiz q ON s.quiz_id = q.id JOIN heritage h ON q.heritage_id = h.id WHERE s.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY s.sort_order
